specs.title: should access protected resource after login

errors.message:
Expected status 200 but received 401 Unauthorized

GET /api/v2/user/profile
Response: {"error":"invalid_token","message":"The access token has been revoked or is malformed"}

Call log:
  - navigating to "https://app.example.com/dashboard"
  - waiting for API response from /api/v2/user/profile
  - received 401 Unauthorized

specs.title: should refresh auth token on expiry

errors.message:
Expected status 200 but received 403 Forbidden

POST /api/v2/auth/refresh
Response: {"error":"refresh_denied","message":"Refresh token endpoint has been deprecated. Use /api/v3/auth/token instead."}

Call log:
  - attempting token refresh via POST /api/v2/auth/refresh
  - received 403 Forbidden
